title: Dev v0.5.4 Shared Item Database Bridge
notes:
Fixes Shared Dev Tools so Refresh/Save All/Submit can read the saved Dev item database instead of failing with no local items found.

Changes:
- Adds a bridge that reads saved Dev item data from the app data folder.
- Tries apl-helper-dev-data.json and apl-helper-dev-data.
- Supports saved database shapes as raw array, { items: [...] }, { database: { items: [...] } }, or { data: { items: [...] } }.
- Refresh Shared Database reports the local item source.
- Save All to Shared Database can use saved item data.
- Submit Update to Master can use saved item data.
- Keeps Dev v0.5.3 shared tools.
